user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
1) you have to understand how hard it is to hit call side edge on a violent downside tape like this.
but it is possible.
the idea is, that the spot is decaying. insiders slowly pushing the price down with a lot of intraday trades that cannot be observed premarket, and ensure short speed environment, while the overall metrics are showing longer skew positioning.
this is contradictionary if somebody doesn't look behind.
but the strategy has been that burning downside vol, so bears cannot really catch premium on the downside. they can, if they are lucky, but you have to sweat a lot
